# R1 · Caching — Redis Patterns Applied

> The read path: serving reads fast and keeping the cache consistent on writes. Six caching patterns grounded in
> EchoStore (`echo/apps/echo_store`), the declared near-cache — an L1 of ETS tables over the shared L2 Valkey — in
> front of codemojex's emoji set, plus a workshop. Served at /redis-patterns/caching. A `soon`
> marker means the module is specified and on the way.

## Modules

- [R1.01 · Cache-aside (lazy loading)](/redis-patterns/caching/cache-aside): on miss fetch and populate; on write invalidate. Grounding: EchoStore.Table.fetch. Dives: miss-fill · invalidation · ttl-staleness.
- [R1.02 · Write-through](/redis-patterns/caching/write-through): write cache and the source synchronously; reads stay fresh. Grounding: EchoStore.Table.put. Dives: dual-write · consistency · latency-cost.
- [R1.03 · Write-behind](/redis-patterns/caching/write-behind): write Valkey now, sync the source asynchronously. Grounding: EchoStore.Journal + the EchoMQ job lane. Dives: async-buffer · durability · coalescing.
- [R1.04 · Server-assisted client-side caching](/redis-patterns/caching/client-side-caching): cache in app memory; the server pushes invalidations. Grounding: RESP3 push + Coherence.broadcast; EchoMQ.Script SHA1. Dives: client-tracking · invalidation-push · script-cache.
- [R1.05 · Cache stampede prevention](/redis-patterns/caching/cache-stampede-prevention): stop a herd regenerating one expired key. Grounding: EchoStore single-flight + jittered TTL. Dives: lock-on-miss · early-refresh · coalescing.
- [R1.06 · Session management](/redis-patterns/caching/session-management): sessions with TTL expiry. Grounding: EchoStore.Table.put + the kind gate. Dives: encodings · ttl-expiry · auth-session.
- [R1.07 · Workshop](/redis-patterns/caching/workshop): cache codemojex's emoji set end to end. Stages: cache-the-catalog · keep-it-consistent · harden-and-measure.

## Up

- [Course home](/redis-patterns) · [R0 · Overview](/redis-patterns/overview) · next: R2 · Coordination (soon)
